effect.subject: tok_lisraya_color_coral
effect.reserved_for: sparing tertiary accent only; never primary CTAs, headlines, or data; avoid in email sections unless the brief calls for it

rule_text: Coral is a sparing tertiary accent only — never use it for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. [GENERAL] Avoid Coral in email sections unless the brief calls for it.
intent: Prevent overuse or misapplication of Coral outside its accent role.
summary: Use Coral sparingly as a tertiary accent only; never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data, and avoid in email unless specified by the brief.
